title: APT Architecture Map Reference

apps.purpose: Deployable project surfaces such as web apps, workers, APIs, tools, and docs sites.
rules: Apps may depend on shared packages.
Apps must not become dumping grounds for reusable doctrine or cross-project contracts.

packages.purpose: Reusable code, UI, config, contracts, and utilities shared by one or more apps.
rules: Shared packages must avoid app-specific runtime assumptions.
Contract packages should be versioned and reviewable.
UI packages should remain presentational unless explicitly scoped otherwise.

docs.purpose: Project-specific adoption records, decisions, reports, and implementation guidance.
rules: Project docs explain local application and exceptions.
Generated public docs must identify their source.

forbidden_flows: Frontend UI directly owns backend business rules.
Server routes trust client-side authorization decisions.
Project docs fork canonical doctrine without a local decision record.
AI prompts are scattered inline without ownership or review.
